items.en: Please obtain the DONATION FORM from Career Development and Alumni Service
items.zh: 請至本校 職涯發展暨校友服務一組 取得 捐款單

items.en: "指定用途 / 單位" field on the form can be selected as follows:
items.zh: 於「指定用途 / 單位」欄位可選：

sub.en: Check "院系務發展基金" and fill in "Department of Communications Design"
sub.zh: 勾選「院系務發展基金」並填寫「媒體傳達設計學系」

sub.en: Check "指定用途" and fill in "Degree Show, Department of Communications Design" or customize.
sub.zh: 勾選「指定用途」並填寫「媒體傳達設計學系畢業展」或自訂

items.en: After completing the form, proceed to Career Development and Alumni Service for processing according to their instructions
items.zh: 填寫完畢後依 職涯發展暨校友服務一組 之說明於該單位辦理
